workers.
Employers who are hiring foreign-born workers are required to pay the prevailing wage.
They have to be subjected to that kind of review and scrutiny and attestation.
And certainly, the Department of Labor needs to be given the enforcement tools that it needs to enforce those laws to - because those are an important piece of the equation.
